docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT'S RECEIVED VIA MAIL (FEDEX)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2024 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-25-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RICHARD HARDACK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HARDACK, RICHARD AIRBNB,INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF RICHARD HARDACK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC., REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLESIG; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,376.45 FILED BY HARDACK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS, AIRBNB, INC.
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)
